creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to comment #10)
> I meant that i asked how to handle patch-files which just changes the
> generation date.
I understand and posted patch command just for other people, who interested to know how to apply patch(es).
(In reply to comment #10)
> I personally see no purpose in committing changes without any effect and
> would have excluded them.
Agreed, but portlint "thinks" otherwise. Therefore I did a `make makepatch` command, like other submitters/committers did.
(In reply to comment #9)
> * tuckpuck.
* tuxpuck.
Sorry about mistakes. It's a funny name for the program, I guess :)
